description: A Codex pet inspired by Bard, the Wandering Caretaker, corrected to emphasize the classic gold mask, huge white beard, burgundy body, bells, and attached meep-like spirit.

pet_notes: A tiny chibi Bard, the Wandering Caretaker, matching the classic reference silhouette: broad warm-gold mask-face with sleepy black oval eyes, enormous flowing cream-white beard and mustache covering the lower face, round squat deep burgundy robed body, dark wine sleeves, chunky mitten hands, tiny feet, horn-like hood tips, bronze-gold shoulder and back bells, front chime, and one tiny attached meep-like gold spirit tucked against the body. Must read as Bard at small pet size, not a generic teal hooded wizard.
style_notes: LoL champion fan pet; reference-correct Bard silhouette; burgundy, gold, cream-white, and dark brown dominate; teal only as tiny attached accent; no Riot logo, no text, no detached spell icons.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
